name: Edit Distance (Levenshtein)
description: Finds the minimum number of insertions, deletions, and substitutions to transform one string into another.
intuition: dp[i][j] = min edits to convert s1[:i] to s2[:j]. If chars match, dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1]. Otherwise take min of 3 operations: delete(dp[i-1][j]+1), insert(dp[i][j-1]+1), substitute(dp[i-1][j-1]+1).
